side_effects.description: Intermittent stinging and itchiness for about a day around belly button, redness for about 1hr post injection

protocol_notes: 55mg GHK-CU vial reconstituted with 3ml Pfizer BAC water, stored in fridge at 4 degrees Celsius. Fine whiteish/blueish specs observed 5 days post reconstitution. 3 doses administered before noticing the specs. Concerned about possible contamination or bad batch.
